title: Pork Sausages with BBQ Onions
excerpt: Ingredients 6 largish onions, cut into wedges 45 ml olive oil 30 ml dried fennel seeds (optional, but delicious with pork) salt, pepper and dried chilli flakes to taste 125 ml tomato sauce 65 ml Worcestershire sauce 65 ml fruit chutney 45 ml brown vinegar 90 ml roughly chopped basil or parsley 750 g good quality …

seo.title: Pork Sausages with BBQ Onions - Marinda Kook

html:
Ingredients

  • 6 largish onions, cut into wedges
  • 45 ml olive oil
  • 30 ml dried fennel seeds (optional, but delicious with pork)
  • salt, pepper and dried chilli flakes to taste
  • 125 ml tomato sauce
  • 65 ml Worcestershire sauce
  • 65 ml fruit chutney
  • 45 ml brown vinegar
  • 90 ml roughly chopped basil or parsley
  • 750 g good quality pork sausages (pork bangers)
  • extra olive oil

Method

Place the onions in an oven dish, drizzle with oil and sprinkle the fennel seeds over, if you're using them. Season to taste with salt, pepper and chilli flakes.

Mix thoroughly and bake uncovered at 190°C for 25 minutes or until the onions are golden brown. Stir the onions occasionally.

Mix together the tomato sauce, Worcestershire sauce, chutney, vinegar and basil or parsley, and stir it into the onions.

Bake for another ten minutes or until the mixture becomes nice and sticky.

Now arrange the sausages on top of the onions, brush with a little oil and bake for 15 minutes.

Then turn the sausages over and bake for another ten minutes or until the sausages are brown and cooked through.

Stir the sausages into the onions, bake for a few more minutes and then remove from the oven.

Serve 4-6 with buttery mashed potatoes and crispy fried sage leaves or fresh rocket.

Easy!

Tip: The onions with the sauce ingredients make a really tasty little sauce that can be served with braaivleis or any other red meat. All you do is fry the onions in a pan
